title: Is there a way to "search for" or "jump to" a specific column by name?

posts.author: FredW (Frederik Wongel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,
I was wondering if there exists a function in Monday to search for a specific column by name, and if possible jump to it in the current view.
Context is, that we use some boards with a boatload of columns, and it would help greatly if there was an option to quicjly find a specific column you are looking for, without the need for filters or scrolling.
Thanks in Advance

Fred

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @FredW

No, there isn’t such an option. What you can do is to hide “boatload - what you need” columns and save it as a different view.
